modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a help desk analyst in response to an email and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in bullet points and use a short and minimal tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show moderate technical familiarity. There should be no spelling errors and some repeated wording or phrases.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Unable to adopt textbooks on usd.textbookx.com due to inactive buttons.

full_description_text:
- The user is trying to adopt textbooks on usd.textbookx.com.  
- The buttons for selecting courses are inactive, preventing any action.  
- The screen shows a "Missing Adoption" message, and there is no fix button available.  
- The issue occurs when logged in as a bookstore admin, with the course not listed.
